line: # Hand-written coverage for comments, exports, quoting, escapes, and interpolation.
# Paths used by the editor and syntax worker
# Expansion forms intentionally exercise greedy interpolation
SHELL_COMMAND='$(date) is not interpolation in dotenv syntax'
# One leading space is accepted before a dotenv comment.
QUOTED_HASH="value # retained inside the quoted string"
export EXPORTED_WITH_NOTE=yes # one leading space is accepted
# Key and spacing boundaries accepted by the vendored matcher
export EXPORTED_KEY="export prefix receives its own scope"
LEADING_VALUE=   spaces are part of the value
TWO_SPACE_KEY=the key itself begins with one captured space
# Values resembling other languages remain ordinary dotenv text
# A tab-indented comment exercises the same grammar branch.
